title: Verify Free60+ earbuds battery level displays correctly after successful connection
steps: Launch the app and complete onboarding (EULA, splash screen, location permissions).
Navigate to the device connection screen.
Connect to Free60+ device.
Wait for the 'Connected' status to appear.
Observe the battery level indicator for the left earbud.
Observe the battery level indicator for the right earbud.
Record the displayed battery percentage for each earbud.
expected: After connection, the battery level for both left and right earbuds displays a value between 1% and 100% (not 0%) within a reasonable time after 'Connected' status appears.

title: Verify Free60+ charging case battery level displays correctly after successful connection
steps: Launch the app and complete onboarding (EULA, splash screen, location permissions).
Navigate to the device connection screen.
Connect to Free60+ device.
Wait for the 'Connected' status to appear.
Observe the battery level indicator for the charging case.
Record the displayed battery percentage for the charging case.
expected: After connection, the battery level for the charging case displays a value between 1% and 100% (not 0%) within a reasonable time after 'Connected' status appears.

title: Verify Free60+ battery levels update dynamically over time after connection
steps: Launch the app and complete onboarding (EULA, splash screen, location permissions).
Connect to Free60+ device.
Wait for 'Connected' status and record initial battery levels for left earbud, right earbud, and charging case.
Wait for 30 seconds without disconnecting.
Re-check and record the battery levels for left earbud, right earbud, and charging case.
Wait for another 30 seconds.
Re-check and record the battery levels again.
expected: Battery levels for earbuds and charging case update dynamically over time and do not remain stuck at the same value (especially 0%) for the entire monitoring period.

title: Verify Free60+ battery levels do not show 0% for an extended period after connection
steps: Launch the app and complete onboarding (EULA, splash screen, location permissions).
Connect to Free60+ device.
Wait for 'Connected' status to appear.
Immediately check and record battery levels for left earbud, right earbud, and charging case.
Wait for 60 seconds, checking battery levels every 10 seconds.
Note any instances where battery level shows 0%.
expected: Battery levels for earbuds and charging case should not show 0% for more than 10 seconds after 'Connected' status appears. If 0% is shown initially, it should update to a valid percentage within 10 seconds.

title: Verify Free60+ battery level display consistency after reconnection
steps: Launch the app and complete onboarding (EULA, splash screen, location permissions).
Connect to Free60+ device and wait for 'Connected' status.
Record battery levels for left earbud, right earbud, and charging case.
Disconnect the Free60+ device.
Reconnect to the Free60+ device.
Wait for 'Connected' status to reappear.
Record battery levels again for left earbud, right earbud, and charging case.
expected: After reconnection, battery levels for earbuds and charging case display valid percentages (1%-100%) and are not stuck at 0%. Battery values should be consistent with the device's actual battery state.

title: Verify Free60+ battery level does not display 0% when device battery is known to be charged
steps: Launch the app and complete onboarding (EULA, splash screen, location permissions).
Ensure Free60+ device has been charged (e.g., earbuds in case, case charged).
Connect to Free60+ device.
Wait for 'Connected' status to appear.
Observe battery level indicators for left earbud, right earbud, and charging case.
expected: When the Free60+ device is known to have charge, battery levels for earbuds and charging case display values greater than 0% after connection.
